testsuite.name: co.touchlab.kampkit.BreedRepositoryTest

testcase.name: Get updated breeds when stale and preserve favorites
Get updated breeds with cache and preserve favorites
Rethrow on API error when stale
No web call if data is not stale

testsuite.system-out: Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 3 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 3 breeds into database Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 3 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 3 breeds into database Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Info: Breed 2: Favorited false Info: (BreedModel) Breeds not fetched from network. Recently updated Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database
